meaning: n.(军队等的)值勤人,名簿,花名册,逐项登记表
examples: The Amateur Softball Association's roster of umpires has declined to 57,000.
The next day he put himself first on the new roster for domestic chores.
Then again, in this economy, having a full roster may not be an option.
In the current fiscal year the company aims to add 40 to its roster of 200 stores.
